flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Oregon State University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.6k → $38.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Oregon State University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.2k → $14.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oregon State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Oregon State University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (40.6% → 47.2%).
